name: submit_job
description: Submit a GPU experiment. You specify the CAPABILITY you need (hardware class, container image, command); the platform provisions it. Returns an opaque job handle for get_job. The provider, region, connection protocol, credentials, and billing are handled below this boundary and are never surfaced to you.

hardware.description: Requested hardware class, e.g. "8xH100", "1xA100-80GB", "cpu". A normalized capability string, not a provider SKU.

image.description: Container image providing the framework/runtime (e.g. a CUDA+PyTorch or ROCm or JAX image).

command.description: Command to run inside the image, in the job workspace.
